caption: A person wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt and a rose-gold watch uses a small heat gun to apply heat to a light blue square of paper on a white wooden surface. The paper features small, white decorative dots. To the left of the paper is a white card with black text and a botanical illustration that reads "S YOU LITTLE lide Greer You warm my heart". In the initial sequence, the person's left hand holds the paper steady while the heat gun is directed at the surface. As the scene progresses, the heat gun is removed, and the person uses both hands to adjust and reposition the blue paper. Their right hand enters the frame to grip the side of the paper, shifting it slightly across the wooden tabletop. The background remains a consistent light-colored wooden grain throughout the sequence.
